description: A medical illustrator needs a 3D model of the Patient's Left Hemicranium (the left half of the skull) for a cutaway visualization from the loaded CT Cranium DICOM scan. Create a 3D surface of only the left side of the skull, cutting along the mid-sagittal plane. Export the resulting surface as a binary STL file to /home/ga/Documents/left_hemicranium.stl. Ensure the correct side is preserved by referencing the orientation markers.
